title: (業界良心)Neo Derm 感謝同事從來都無得Home Office

replies.msg:
祝大家無得WFH既同事 Happy Friday

星期一記住準時翻工喇

利申OIE 已中2件


「親愛的同事們

HAPPY FRIDAY!

想感謝大家在過去幾個月來的付出和努力不懈的精神！雖然疫情依然未有轉機，但我們希望大家可以安心上班，做最好的自己！在此提提大家，為了自己和工作夥伴們，請麻煩大家要勤洗手，勤帶口罩和勤消毒。如有不適，請自行通知公司並且求醫或留在家裡休息觀察。最重要的是請大家謹記每日服用Cell Armour保護好自己。

如有任何疑問或需要意見的地方，歡迎大家隨時與HR部門諮詢。

多謝。


HR Department」

NEODERM每朝逼人食神藥返工 連裝修都唔比WFH ！！！

PK老闆罔顧衛生處勸告
繼續逼員工每朝食無牌藥物
疫情嚴峻 繼續9-6上班
甚至公司裝修 連AB更都唔安排
高層全部擦鞋鬼
唔會幫下屬爭取彈性上班時間
亦冇人夠膽向老闆提出訴求
一提就炒魷魚嘅態度
遲職都唔係即日走 呢排咁嚴重
分分鐘last day前已經中招
點算好！！！

replies.msg:
Dear Colleagues,

We have been informed that a staff on 67th floor was reported as tested positive for Covid-19 on 19 October. The staff has not been at work since 16 October.

We take this case extremely seriously and to protect the health of all our staff members at the workplace, the Company will take appropriate steps to ensure safety and maximum protection:

1. Close contact staff has already been arranged for testing and quarantine by Centre for Health Protection (CHP)
2. The Company will arrange staff who are seated in the close proximity area the Government’s Deep Throat Saliva Test tomorrow
3. We will distribute the test kit provided by CHP to every staff at 67th floor tomorrow
4. If you develop any symptoms or feeling unwell, please seek immediate medical assistance
5. Thorough cleaning and disinfect the offices has been arranged tomorrow at 7.00am
6. All staff are required to have their body temperature measured, practice personal hygiene, wear a mask at all time while in the office premises
7. If you have any concerns or feedback, please contact HR

It is important that we all respond responsibly in order for protecting our staff and customers, we assure you that we will continue in providing the necessary health precautions.

For internal enquiries, please contact HR 3511 7333. For external enquiries, please contact 4647 8848.

Yours sincerely,

Neo Derm HR Department
